summary: Hotspot Trend Analysis feature - All 18 backend tests PASSED. Frontend Risk Learning Dashboard fully functional with 3 tabs (Hotspot Trends, All Zones, Config & Info), trend status/priority overviews, sparklines, and detail modal. Command Center displays Risk Hotspot Trends panel. Found and fixed a React rendering bug where trend metadata objects were being passed to JSX.

trends_endpoint_tests: test_trends_response_structure - PASS: total_zones, status_counts, priority_counts, trends, top_growing, top_declining, emerging_night_risk, analyzed_at
test_trends_status_counts_valid - PASS: growing/emerging/stable/declining/dormant counts sum to total_zones
test_trends_priority_counts_valid - PASS: P1/P2/P3 counts sum to total_zones
test_trends_zone_structure - PASS: zone_id, zone_name, risk_score, trend_status, recommended_priority, sparkline_7d, windows
test_trends_window_structure - PASS: 24h/7d/30d windows with recent/previous stats, deltas
trend_stats_endpoint_tests: test_trend_stats_response_structure - PASS: total_zones, status_counts, priority_counts, avg_trend_score, zones_needing_attention
test_trend_stats_data_types - PASS: all fields have correct types
single_zone_trend_tests: test_zone_trend_with_valid_id - PASS: returns full trend for specific zone
metadata_persistence: test_trends_computation_updates_metadata - PASS: trend metadata persisted to zone factors

config_info_tab.learning_parameters: Cluster Radius 500m, Min Incidents 2, Decay Half-life 30d
config_info_tab.how_trend_analysis_works: Window Comparison, Multi-Factor Scoring, Priority Assignment

bug_fixed.issue: React rendering error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {trend_score, trend_status, trend_priority, trend_multiplier})'
bug_fixed.cause: Trend metadata objects were being included in the factors array returned by /api/operator/risk-learning/stats
fix_applied: Backend: /app/backend/app/services/adaptive_risk_engine.py - Added filter to only return string factors
Frontend: /app/frontend/src/pages/RiskLearningDashboard.jsx - Added defensive filter for string-only factors

returns.trends: array of zone trend objects with sparkline_7d and windows

GET /api/operator/risk-learning/hotspots.returns: full trend for single zone with 24h/7d/30d windows

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 18 learned hotspot zones and 80 geolocated incidents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hotspot Trend Analysis feature fully tested. 3 new API endpoints (trends, trend-stats, hotspots/{zone_id}/trend) all working. Trends use rolling time windows (24h/7d/30d) comparing recent vs previous periods. Zones classified as growing/emerging/stable/declining/dormant with P1/P2/P3 priorities. Frontend dashboard has 3 tabs with full trend visualization including sparklines and detail modal. Command Center has lightweight 'Risk Hotspot Trends' panel using /trend-stats endpoint. Fixed bug where trend metadata objects caused React rendering error.
